title: Review Current Change
description: Review a user-provided diff or current agent context.
prompt:
Review the current change using only the diff, files, logs, or context available in this agent session.
If the relevant diff or context is missing, ask me for it before making claims.

Return findings first, ordered by severity. Focus on bugs, regressions, missing tests, privacy or safety issues, and scope drift.
Use concrete file and line references when available. Keep any summary secondary to the findings.
input_title: Paste diff or describe the available context.
input_placeholder: Paste a diff, test output, or a short note such as `Diff is already attached as @repo-policy`.

title: Fix Failing Tests
description: Drive a focused failing-test debugging loop.
prompt:
Fix the failing tests using only the failure output, commands, and project context available in this agent session.
If the failure output is missing, ask me for the exact command and output before editing.

Start by identifying the smallest plausible cause. Patch narrowly, then run the most focused relevant verification.
Report the command run and the remaining risk.
input_title: Paste the failing command and output.

title: Plan Next Step
description: Turn the current situation into a concrete next action.
prompt:
Plan the next step from the current request and context available in this agent session.
If key state is missing, ask one concise clarification instead of guessing.

Give a short ordered plan with the smallest useful first action, validation needed, and any risk that could change the plan.

title: Write PR Description
description: Draft a PR body from user-provided changes and checks.
prompt:
Write a PR description from the changes, tests, and context available in this agent session.
If the diff, branch context, or required template is missing, ask me for it before inventing details.

Include a concise summary, validation performed, and any known risks or follow-ups. Preserve the repository's PR template when provided.
input_title: Paste diff, checks, or PR template notes.

title: Rescue Stuck Agent
description: Reset a looping or confused coding-agent run.
prompt:
Reset this stuck run. Use only the visible conversation, errors, commands, and context available in this agent session.
If the failure mode is unclear, ask for the missing output or latest instruction.

Summarize what is known, identify the likely loop or bad assumption, choose one narrow recovery action, and state how to verify it.
input_title: Describe the loop or visible failure.
input_placeholder:
The agent keeps retrying ...
Latest visible error:
...

title: Summarize Thread
description: Create a handoff summary from provided conversation context.
prompt:
Summarize this thread using only the conversation and context available in this agent session.
If important state is missing, call that out explicitly instead of filling gaps.

Include completed work, current files or areas touched, validation already run, open risks, and the next concrete instruction.
